utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided with physical_health plan and cost, and mental_health plan and cost. Fully specified. 
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided home_contents with plan and cost. Fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided travel_insurance with plan and cost. Fully specified. 
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Multiple services listed each with description and cost. Fully specified. 
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly_cost and annual_cost. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific plans: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance. Cross-referencing with the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home content) rating 7; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating 7. The additional services listed (preventive care package, gym membership reimbursement, wellness programs, premium medical network, 24/7 travel assistance) correspond to categories in enhancement services, but only two match named items with explicit ratings: Preventive Care Package (rating 8), Premium Medical Network (rating 10), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 9). "Wellness programs" and "gym membership reimbursement" as phrased do not exactly match any single named ground-truth service except Wellness Programs (rating 9) and Gym Membership Reimbursement (rating 5), which are present under health_enhancement_services.
